title: Outpace — daily 9PM step leaderboard, iMessage-native, freemium PRD
html:
Outpace — daily 9PM step leaderboard, iMessage-native, freemium PRD

Source: 2025-11-15 Google Doc. The most complete Outpace PRD in the corpus to date — covers product flow, monetization tiers, marketing, and (notably) full 10DLC SMS-compliance copy. Belongs to the stealth-apps cluster.

TL;DR

  • The product: Apple Health-connected step tracker that sends a daily 9PM iMessage-style leaderboard to your friends. Effortless. Auto-discovers contacts. Winner customizes tomorrow's leaderboard background image.
  • Core flow (5 steps): download → grant HealthKit → grant Contacts → done forever → see ranking nightly.
  • Design language: extremely Apple-centric — light blue, black, white. Logo concept = three people walking on a podium-ladder.
  • Monetization (3 streams):
    • Premium subscription $4.99/mo or $39.99/yr — unlimited friends, multiple boards (Work/Family/Gym), historical data, weekly+monthly trends, custom notification times, streak tracking, private 1v1 challenges, no branding on iMessage cards. Targets 12% conversion.
    • Challenge entry fees with 20% platform take — $5-$10 weekly step challenges, prize-pool splits (winner-takes-all OR 70/20/10 OR all-finishers-split). Frames as skill-not-chance to stay legal.
    • Cosmetics — profile themes ($1.99-$2.99), animated victories ($0.99), badge packs ($0.99-$4.99), streak insurance ($0.99/mo for one missed day).
  • Revenue projection: ~$13k/month at 10K users = ~$159K/yr. ~$66k/month at 50K users = ~$794K/yr.
  • Launch phasing: Phase 1 free-only (build network effects) → Phase 2 premium at 1-10K users → Phase 3 challenges at 10K+ → Phase 4 cosmetics at 10K+.
  • Marketing angles brainstormed: Austin half-marathon partnerships, running clubs, SORA Pro AI-video of women walking, body-part shorthand list (chest, traps, quads etc — likely Brotein cross-pollination).
  • Potential names tested: Slog, Plodge, Trog. (None survived — "Outpace" / "Pace" stuck.)
  • 10DLC SMS compliance section: full opt-in/opt-out copy, sample messages, healthcare vertical, vrtlpirates.com privacy URL, pace://activate deep link.

Pattern observed

This is Yahir's most fully-specced consumer-app PRD to date. The triple-revenue-stream design (subscription + challenges + cosmetics) is more sophisticated than Brotein or BroMenu ever got — suggests Outpace was meant to be the "first real product" of the stealth-apps cluster.

The iMessage-native framing is the differentiator vs Strava — leveraging iOS-native social rails instead of building a separate app graph. Ties to the frictionless-onboarding obsession in the March polish note (Apple Design Award standard).

The skill-not-chance challenge framing mirrors the Swipr session bet model — Yahir has converged on prize-pool-fee + skill framing across two separate apps as his preferred legal-arbitrage gambling primitive.

The vrtlpirates.com domain links Outpace into the "vrtl" / Vrtl Bet" naming family — suggests an umbrella entity Yahir uses for ventures.

Key quotes

  • "Don't charge for the app. Charge for the experience."
  • "Free tier creates addiction. Premium removes annoying limits. Friends pressure each other to upgrade."
  • "Users pay because they want to, not because they have to."

Open questions

  • The Sarah/Tom/Emma sample-message names — placeholder, or did Yahir actually have a beta-tester group?
  • 10DLC compliance work suggests SMS infrastructure was being set up — did Outpace actually launch SMS?
  • The "vrtlpirates.com" domain — what's the umbrella brand? (Likely Vrtl Pirates = parent entity for Vrtl Bet, Outpace, etc.)
  • Why the body-part shorthand list mid-doc? (Looks like accidental Brotein artifact.)
